source: Kumagai 1993 Eur J Biochem 212:151; ITC: García-Hernández 2002
structural_notes: 1LZB — WT binds (GlcNAc)3 in A-B-C mode only
1LZG — binds in TWO modes (A-B-C + B-C-D); fewer stacking contacts
1LZC — even weaker B-site binding; no H-bond network at C-site
drastic change: prefers minor binding mode; ratio A-E/B-F → 0.8:1 vs 4:1 WT
buried Trp — less surface-exposed than W62
